news.headline: Certain U.S. industries welcome tariffs amid concerns over material costs. Steel and aluminum sectors are supportive.
news.summary: Businesses are expressing some reservations about implementing import taxes due to concerns over the high cost of materials. However, steel and aluminum manufacturers are showing support for the measure.

news.headline: Italian PPI YoY Actual 4.4% (Forecast -, Previous 1.1%)
Italian PPI MoM Actual 1.6% (Forecast -, Previous 0.6%)
XRP price may see $1.61 if bulls defend $2.00 level.
news.summary: The price of XRP is currently at risk of dropping to $1.61, however, it may avoid a crash if the bulls manage to maintain the price above the critical level of $2.00. This level is key for the bulls to stabilize and make a recovery.

news.headline: dynaCERT orders parts to assemble 1,000 HydraGEN™ HG1 Units, transitioning to full-scale producer. #carbonemissions
news.summary: In the latest business update, dynaCERT Inc. disclosed their plans to assemble 1,000 HydraGEN™ HG1 Units, with a clear intention to scale up production in response to increasing demand. The company, listed on the TSX under DYA, OTC under DYFSF, and FRA under DMJ, has initiated the procurement of essential parts for this purpose. Emphasizing stringent quality control measures, dynaCERT aims to solidify their position as a major producer. This move marks a critical step in their progression towards full-scale manufacturing. The announcement was made in Toronto and highlights the company's commitment to growth.

news.headline: Alm. Brand A/S bought back X shares in their weekly report.
Government Debt Management changes plan to issue new inflation-indexed bond series maturing in 2050 instead of 2044 as initially planned.
news.summary: The Government Debt Management has updated its annual Prospect for 2025 by altering its original plan. Instead of issuing a new inflation-indexed bond series set to mature in 2044 with market making arrangements, they will now be issuing an inflation-indexed bond that matures in 2050, also with market making arrangements. This adjustment will take place this year and requires attention from investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Organ transplants from genetically modified pigs offer hope for patients, though ethical concerns linger.
news.summary: Certain scientists are optimistic about the future of using organs from genetically modified pigs for transplantation into humans on a regular basis. However, there are significant ethical concerns that still need to be addressed before this can become a common practice.

news.headline: Trump to cut I.R.S. staff, reduce audits. Plans to politicize agency operations.
news.summary: The President aims to significantly reduce the number of employees in the workforce and transform the Internal Revenue Service into a more politically-driven organization.

news.headline: EV Cargo Group Limited reports strong financial results for 2024, ending Dec 31, transforming its services globally.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Hong Kong, EV Cargo Group Limited, a top global transporter and logistics services provider, released its unaudited financial outcomes for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: European NATO countries rely on US for arms imports, according to SIPRI, a recent report shows.
Trump focuses on personal gain in deals.
Hai Robotics Europe joins FEM-AEM to boost warehouse automation in Spain & EMEA region, effective 2/25/2025.
news.summary: Hai Robotics Europe BV has recently joined the Asociación Española de Manutención (FEM-AEM) on February 25, 2025, marking a significant step in advancing automation and innovation in the material handling sector in Spain and the EMEA region. The membership in FEM-AEM comes following the launch of Hai Robotics' HaiPick Climb system, demonstrating the company's dedication to industry collaboration and standardization. This move underlines Hai Robotics' commitment to enhancing efficiency and technological advancements in material handling and signifies a crucial step towards fostering a strong network within the sector.

news.headline: Aviator LLC grants exclusive IP license to Aviator Studio for gambling services & online games. Wins trademark case in Georgia. Court supports ruling against SPRIBE OU.
news.summary: A company called Aviator LLC in Tbilisi, Georgia has given Aviator Studio a global license for its branding and intellectual property related to gambling services and online game production. Aviator LLC, which owns the trademark for a widely known crash game, has successfully resolved legal disputes involving alleged infringement. Georgia’s Court of Appeal recently affirmed a lower court decision against SPRIBE OU on February 17th. The licensing agreement is exclusive and irrevocable, providing Aviator Studio sole access to the branding and intellectual property.

news.headline: Huize Holding Limited (NASDAQ: HUIZ) to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 24, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, Huize Holding Limited, a prominent insurance technology platform in Asia traded as HUIZ on NASDAQ, revealed intentions to disclose its unaudited financial results for Q4 and full year of 2024 on March 24, 2025, before the U.S. market opens. Huize is known for digitally linking consumers, insurance carriers, and distribution partners through data-focused and AI-supported solutions. This move aims to provide transparency and insight into the company's performance for investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: ST Engineering iDirect launches Intuition Unbound, a consumption-based ground segment service, boosting revenue.
news.summary: ST Engineering iDirect, a leading satellite communications company, announced the launch of Intuition Unbound on March 10, 2025, in Herndon, Virginia. This service model aims to expedite service setup and increase time to revenue to aid in business expansion. Intuition Unbound is recognized as the satellite industry's pioneer ground segment solution.

news.headline: FAR Biotech LLC joins JLABS, Johnson & Johnson's global incubator, on March 10, 2025.'Read full article for more details on the collaboration.
news.summary: In Houston on March 10, 2025, FAR Biotech, LLC, known as FAR, revealed its new status as a resident company of Johnson & Johnson's worldwide incubator network, JLABS. This move allows FAR to access resources and opportunities within JLABS, a network fostering open innovation and empowerment for emerging companies.

news.headline: Yilin Press debuts first graphic novel adaptation of The Three-Body Problem at London Book Fair 2025 with event on 11th March.
news.summary: Details of the event taking place on March 11th from 15:00 to 15:30 at the London Book Fair 2025, specifically at stand number 5E121 hosted by Yilin Press, a division of Phoenix Publishing and Media Group. The event is organized by Yilin Press, an imprint of Phoenix Publishing and Media Group.

news.headline: Oil prices slip amid negative China data and risk-off sentiment, sparking market concerns.
Lionsgate & Lionsgate Studios set annual & special meetings for March 10, 2025 in California & Vancouver. Stock symbols: LGF.A, LGF.B, LION.
news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, and Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 10, 2025, Lions Gate Entertainment Corp. (NYSE: LGF.A, LGF.B) and Lionsgate Studios Corp. (Nasdaq: LION) disclosed details of the annual general and special meeting of Lionsgate. The event will address key matters concerning the companies' operations, with Lionsgate's stock trading under the symbols LGF.A and LGF.B on the NYSE, while Lionsgate Studios is listed as LION on the Nasdaq exchange.

news.headline: Firestorm Labs awarded $25.1 million in STRATFI funding to advance modular UAS production and deployment.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in San Diego, Firestorm Labs, a prominent company specializing in modular, additively manufactured unmanned aerial systems (UAS), secured the STRATFI PY25.1 award to expand the production and deployment of innovative software-driven, battlefield-adaptive UAS. This selection marks a significant milestone for the company, signaling a strategic move towards enhancing their capabilities in this sector. The award aims to support Firestorm Labs in scaling up their operations, enabling them to cater to a broader market and solidify their position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Ranger Chocolate Co. expands into historic Olympic Mills building in Portland & announces Craft Chocolate Festival.
news.summary: A company specializing in craft chocolate and confections, Ranger Chocolate Co., has revealed plans for a significant expansion in Portland. The new facility will be housed in the Olympic Mills building, a historic landmark in the city. The company's move represents a milestone in its growth and commitment to innovation. Originally named the Olympic Cereal Mill, the building's new state-of-the-art space will serve as the hub for Ranger Chocolate Co.'s operations. The company's expansion signifies a key development in its journey and signifies a strategic investment in its future success.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Rubio: We're officially cancelling 83% of the programs at USAID.
Mark Carney wins Liberal Party leadership race in Canada with 85.9% of the vote, vows tough stance against Trump in trade war.
news.summary: Mark Carney, aged 59 and former governor of the Bank of Canada and Bank of England, won the Liberal Party leadership race in Canada with an overwhelming 85.9% of the vote. This landslide victory positioned him to succeed Justin Trudeau as the country's Prime Minister. Carney, a political newcomer without prior elected office experience, emphasized his strong stance against U.S. President Donald Trump's trade threats in his victory speech. His financial and crisis management expertise is considered a valuable asset for the role. This news comes at a time of escalating tensions between the neighboring countries, highlighting the significance of Carney's win in the political landscape.

news.headline: Chinese investors set new record in purchasing Hong Kong stocks.
UK public health agency offering free online course, "Understanding Tobacco Harm Reduction," to tackle smoking-related deaths.
news.summary: In London on March 10, 2025, a UK public health agency named Knowledge•Action•Change (K•A•C) will be introducing a new online course titled Understanding Tobacco Harm Reduction. This initiative aims to lower the rates of disease and death attributable to burning tobacco and harmful smokeless products. The course will be provided free of charge to participants.

news.headline: ÍL Fund and Ministry of Finance collaborate on proposals for settling HFF bonds to wind up ÍL Fund. Project team recommends advancing efforts.
news.summary: A committee consisting of the Minister of Finance and Economic Affairs along with advisors to the pension funds has collaboratively created suggestions for the resolution of Housing Financing Fund (HFF) bonds, aiming to streamline the closure process of ÍL Fund (formerly known as HFF). Recommendations regarding these proposals have been put forth by the ÍL Fund project management team to the Minister, emphasizing the need to progress with the suggested measures.

news.headline: Viridien debuts senior secured notes offering, aiming to raise significant funds for expansion.
Mphasis partners with SecPod for cybersecurity; Mphasis specializes in cloud/cognitive services, SecPod in SaaS-based cybersecurity.
news.summary: Today in Redwood City, California, Mphasis, a leading Information Technology firm specializing in cloud and cognitive services, revealed a key collaboration with SecPod. The partnership entails a joint effort to enhance cybersecurity offerings. Mphasis, listed on BSE as 526299 and NSE as MPHASIS, continues to make strides in the IT sector.

news.headline: Record-breaking red candle in Bitcoin this week: biggest USD drop in a week ever as traders flee risk-assets. #BTC #crypto
news.summary: Bitcoin experienced a significant decline against the US dollar within one week, surpassing any previous drops. This led to risk-asset traders swiftly exiting their positions.

news.headline: BBVA approved to enable Bitcoin and Ether trading in Spain, becoming second-largest lender to offer crypto services on mobile app.
news.summary: The second-largest bank in Spain has announced that it will offer its customers the ability to purchase, sell, and oversee cryptocurrencies through its mobile banking application.

news.headline: Sydbank purchases its shares in week 10 as part of a buyback program.
Earnings on March 10, 2025: Franco-Nevada expects $305.85M revenue; BioNTech -$1.15B revenue; Aligos Therapeutics loss at $3.67/share.
news.summary: Before the bell, several companies are expected to report their quarterly earnings. Franco-Nevada may report earnings of $0.89 per share on revenue of $305.85 million, BioNTech may report earnings of $0.37 per share on revenue of $1.15 billion, and UroGen Pharma may report a loss of $0.72 per share on revenue of $25.25 million. DarioHealth could report a loss of $0.14 per share on revenue of $7.39 million, Fennec Pharmaceuticals may report a loss of $0.13 per share on revenue of $16.42 million, and Aligos Therapeutics may report a loss of $3.67 per share on revenue of $433 thousand. After the bell, Ramaco Resources is expected to report earnings of $0.04 per share on revenue of $176.04 million. Other companies like Optical Cable, Cohen & Co, Genie Energy, and Willis Lease Finance will also be reporting their earnings.

news.headline: Greenwave's margins increase as scrap metal prices rise ahead of steel and aluminum import tariffs on March 12, 2025. Prices for scrap steel surge over 20%, 100% domestically sourced.
news.summary: New tariffs are now impacting all foreign steel and aluminum imports, with no exceptions or exclusions. Greenwave is supplying 100% domestically sourced scrap metal to major companies like Nucor, Sims, Cleveland-Cliffs, and Georgia-Pacific. Prices for scrap steel have risen by over 20% in the past month. This increase is predicted to continue in the coming days.

news.headline: HK Monetary Authority discloses results of 20-year gov bond tender: bid-to-cover ratio of 4.50 and yield of 3.851% announced.
news.summary: Hong Kong Monetary Authority disclosed the outcomes of a tender regarding 20-year HKD institutional government bonds with a bid-to-cover ratio of 4.50 and an annualized yield standing at 3.851%.

news.headline: HK Monetary Authority shares 5-year bond reopening results: bid-to-cover ratio of 6.25 for institutional Govt Bonds.
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has released the outcomes of the tender for the re-opening of 5-year institutional Government Bonds, revealing a bid-to-cover ratio of 6.25.

news.headline: Proposal SIMD-228 for Solana aims to balance inflation and staking by introducing a dynamic model. Vote on March 7.
news.summary: The proposal known as SIMD-228 is seeking to implement a dynamic inflation model within the Solana network. This has led to discussions and differing opinions among stakers and validators within the community. The decision through voting on the proposal is scheduled to take place on March 7th. However, there is a possibility of delays in the implementation process, causing uncertainty among stakeholders.

news.headline: Estée Lauder teams up with Microsoft for AI-driven trend forecasting in beauty sector, reshaping marketing strategies.
news.summary: Estée Lauder has joined forces with Microsoft to develop a generative AI ecosystem aimed at improving trend forecasting and marketing strategies within the beauty sector. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in utilizing advanced technology in the industry, potentially revolutionizing how products are marketed and trends are predicted. The partnership between Estée Lauder and Microsoft introduces a new era of innovation with the potential to greatly impact the beauty market.

news.headline: Buenos Aires set to become blockchain hub with Devconnect 2025 on Nov 17-22, boosting Ethereum adoption and showcasing innovation.
news.summary: Devconnect 2025 is scheduled to take place in Buenos Aires, Argentina, from November 17th to the 22nd. The event aims to drive Ethereum adoption and highlight cutting-edge blockchain innovations.

news.headline: Venture capital secondary markets offer new opportunities for investors, driven by growth trends. Learn more at VanEck.
news.summary: Learn about the changing landscape of venture capital secondary markets and the factors fueling their expansion, as discussed by VanEck. This market segment has seen significant growth in recent years, with transactions amounting to billions of dollars. Discover how these markets are generating unique investment prospects that are attracting both traditional and new investors. Explore further insights from VanEck on this trend.

news.headline: Linea makes transition to native USDC for improved blockchain payment solutions, ensuring secure DeFi and personal finance transactions.
news.summary: Linea's transition to utilizing native USDC represents a significant milestone in blockchain payment networks. This upgrade ensures smoother transactions and increased security for DeFi and personal finance apps. This move has the potential to revolutionize the industry by offering improved efficiency and protection.

news.headline: Aave V3 rolls out on Linea Network, with MetaMask Card providing 1% USDC cashback in certain regions. Enhancing DeFi possibilities and crypto use.
news.summary: Aave V3 deployment on Linea Network is set to broaden DeFi opportunities. The MetaMask Card now offers a 1% cashback in USDC, making it more convenient for users in specific regions. This move aims to enhance crypto accessibility and usability across the platform.

news.headline: Denver's BNB Incubation Alliance announces winning blockchain projects at ETHDenver, boosting innovations for Web3 users.
news.summary: Winners of the BNB Incubation Alliance at ETHDenver, revealed by BNB Chain, with the objective of hastening blockchain advancements and bringing in the next billion Web3 users. Learn more about this initiative.

news.headline: Ethereum Foundation adds Hsiao-Wei Wang to Board of Directors, joining key members like Vitalik Buterin.
news.summary: The Ethereum Foundation has named Hsiao-Wei Wang to its Board of Directors, adding her to a distinguished group that includes Vitalik Buterin and Aya Miyaguchi. Wang's appointment brings the total number of board members to five, solidifying the leadership team overseeing Ethereum's operations. This move signals the Foundation's commitment to diversifying its leadership and bringing in top talent to guide the future direction of the platform. Wang's expertise will serve as a valuable asset as Ethereum continues to grow and evolve in the increasingly competitive blockchain industry.

news.headline: $1.5B ByBit hack linked with North Korean hackers exposed by security expert Matt Gleason.
news.summary: Learn about the recent $1.5 billion cyber attack on ByBit, which is considered the biggest cryptocurrency theft to date. Security analyst Matt Gleason has connected the hack to North Korean cybercriminals. Further information can be found in the full article.

news.headline: Render Network examines decentralized AI future and DePIN at ETH Denver 2025, showcasing AI agent and decentralized compute advances.
news.summary: At ETH Denver in 2025, Render Network explored the upcoming advancements in decentralized AI and DePIN technology. The event showcased cutting-edge developments in AI agents and decentralized computing. This initiative is paving the way for a new era of innovation and collaboration in the field of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Model Context Protocol (MCP): Tech community debates its impact - game-changer or passing trend? Experts weigh in. #techdebate
news.summary: Discussions within the tech community have been ignited by the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Some experts argue that it has the potential to be a game-changer, while others view it as just another passing fad. This has led to a divide among professionals as they grapple with the significance of MCP in the industry.

news.headline: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. announces early redemption of EUR450,000,000 bond issue due on March 27, 2030.
news.summary: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has announced its decision to fully redeem early the bond issue of EUR450,000,000 Subordinated Fixed Rate Reset Notes due 27 March 2030.

news.headline: Manager and closely related parties disclosed share transactions at Schouw & Co. as per EU regulation (EU) no. 596/2014.
news.summary: A disclosure has been made regarding transactions by a person in a managerial role at Aktieselskabet Schouw & Co. or closely associated with them, as required by Regulation (EU) no. 596/2014. This notification is in compliance with the regulations set forth by the European Parliament and the Council. The disclosed information pertains to financial activities and obligations involving this individual or their close associates within the organization. This disclosure is a part of the transparency requirements regarding transactions conducted by persons holding key positions within the company.

news.headline: New Russia-US talks are not planned this week - Tass
